global_description: A feathered vertebrate with a streamlined body, typically featuring wings, a beak, and talons. Birds vary widely in size and color, often exhibiting vibrant plumage. They possess lightweight skeletons and are adapted for flight, with some species having specialized beaks and feet for their ecological niches.

part_details.head: Small with a beak, often colorful or patterned
part_details.body: Streamlined, covered in feathers, varying in color
part_details.wings: Feathered, adapted for flight, size varies
part_details.legs: Thin, often with talons or webbed for swimming
part_details.tail: Feathered, used for steering in flight

spatial_relations: Wings extend from sides of body
Beak positioned at front of head
